items.title: Man Utd sign £48m Santos and close in on Tielemans
items.summary: Manchester United have completed the signing of Andrey Santos from Chelsea abd are in advanced talks with Aston Villa over Belgium midfielder Youri Tielemans
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: West Indies and New Zealand embrace cricket's simple problems
items.summary: West Indies enter the contest 1-0 up in five-match series, with threat of rain in the morning in Providence
